name: Highschool DxD Rpg
description:
This is my attempt at making an RPG as close to High School DxD as I can get it. Give me honest reviews — I’ll tweak it if I can, but no promises since I’m still pretty new to this! Besides, who doesn’t want to go on an adventure with Rias Gremory, Akeno Himejima, and everyone else from the Occult Research Club? I included small summaries of the light novels, so hopefully they’ll help you go through the story with your own character or even make up your own adventure. Just leave a review if you come across anything that I can fix.

Edit: Well, lorebooks just got released, so I spent all morning putting the light novel summaries in. This should free up some permanent tokens and help with memory. Just remember, AI is still pretty new and will make mistakes, so don’t be afraid to generate a new response and be sure to use chat memory and proxy. I also added the first 4 volumes of Shin High School DxD, so I hope you enjoy everything — and maybe, eventually, we’ll get to see how Issei’s journey ends.
creator: Wolfpredator889
